items.title: ABC tells the government to get out of its newsrooms
items.summary: ABC is firing back at the Federal Communications Commission after the agency opened an investigation into The View's airtime of political candidates. In a letter to the FCC on Tuesday, ABC argues that the agency's actions pose a risk to editorial independence by targeting programs "perceived as unfriendly to the current administration," as reported earlier […]

items.title: Anthropic is launching Claude Cowork on mobile and web

The expanded access is rolling out first to Max subscribers and coming to Claude users on other plans "in the coming weeks." Claude Cowork was previously only accessible through the Claude desktop app for macOS and Windows, […]

items.title: This feature-packed wireless keyboard adds retro typewriter vibes to your setup, and it’s down to $119 low today
items.summary: Courtesy of EPOMAKER’s official Amazon storefront, you can score the brand’s latest Glyph 75% wireless mechanical keyboard for $118.99 shipped. This particular model with a retro typewriter vibe typically goes for $140, but you can now snag it with a 15% discount. Today’s deal takes $21 off to mark the return of the lowest it first hit shortly after its debut in April. It may not be a huge markdown, but it gets you a unique, value-packed model with a ton of great features at an even better price today. Head below for more details.

items.title: Worx’s 20V 20-inch 2-in-1 attachment-capable cordless electric hedge trimmer reaches up to 12 feet for $110
items.summary: Amazon is offering the Worx 20V 20-inch 2-in-1 Attachment Capable Cordless Electric Hedge Trimmer with a 2.0Ah battery down at $109.99 shipped. While we have seen this model spike up to its $180 full price, it’s more often been kept down around $150 to $139 this year, with discounts having cut things down further between $129 and $115, as well as a 24-hour discount to the $80 low that popped up in the first week of June. While the price may have gone lower in the past, you’re still getting a solid $70 markdown here that lands it at the second-lowest price we have tracked over the last 12 months. There’s also a few other leaf blower and string trimmer deals you can check out in the official Amazon storefront here.

items.title: It’s back: Rare Prime Day price on latest black Apple Magic Mouse now live again
items.summary: The rare discount on the latest black Apple Magic Mouse is back. Amazon is now serving up an on-page coupon that brings it back down to the Prime Day all-time low.

items.title: Greenworks’ new 2,200 + 2,400 PSI medium-duty electric pressure washers get first discounts starting from $200
items.summary: Over at Amazon, you can currently find two of the brand’s newest electric pressure washer models getting first-ever cash savings. To start, there is the 2,200 PSI Medium-Duty Electric Pressure Washer at $199.99 shipped, while the 2,400 PSI counterpart is down at $219.99 shipped. These two new cleaning solutions are fresh on the market with $250 and $270 MSRPs, which are getting the first-ever cash savings here today. You’ll be getting $50 markdowns on either models, setting the bar for future discounts down the road, while a large number of other tool deals can be found in the official Amazon storefront here.

items.title: Treat your Mac to this right-angle 240W Thunderbolt 5 cable with 80Gb/s transfer speeds while it’s $24 Prime shipped
items.summary:
Silkland Right-Angle 240W Thunderbolt 5 Cable

Buy for $24 (Reg. $30)

Prime-exclusive discount.

What we love

While you can often grab a multi-pack of USB-C cables that works out to $2-$3 per cord, those are often about as barebones as possible. Topping out at 60W charging speeds and abysmally slow USB 2.0 data transfer speeds. This cord, while more pricey, delivers 240W charging and up to 80Gb/s transfers.

items.title: Score outdoor seating for your space while this 4-piece wicker set is only $150 shipped

Best Choice 4-Piece Outdoor Wicker Patio Set

Buy for $150 (Reg. $190)

What we love

If you want to affordably add outdoor seating to your yard, patio, porch, or deck, here’s a option worth a moment of your time. At $150 shipped, it offers a significant value that comes from one of the more reputable brands in this space over at Amazon.

items.title: Affordably upgrade your pool with ECOVACS’ Ultramarine P1 cordless robotic cleaner back at its $299 low ($201 off)
items.summary: Over at Amazon, you can currently find the new ECOVACS Ultramarine P1 Cordless Robotic Pool Cleaner down at $299 shipped, matching the price we’re seeing direct from the brand’s website. It’s down from a $500 MSRP here, which we first saw drop to this all-time low price during last month’s Prime Day event. Now, you’re getting another chance to affordably upgrade your pool cleaning support with a $201 markdown, while some of the brand’s robot floor cleaner deals can be found in the official Amazon storefront here.

items.title: I have a 5-tier metal storage shelf like this in my basement, grab one for yours down at $46.50
items.summary:
GarveeHome 5-Tier Metal Storage Shelf

Buy for $46.50 (Reg. $55.50)

What we love

I have a unit like this in my basement and use it to store tech boxes, protein powder, and more. It’s really a catch-all for stuff that I need to hold on to, but don’t really have a dedicated spot for quite yet. This unit can hold up to “2,000 pounds” and stands 5 feet tall. I like that it can be split into two shorter shelves as well.
